title: Dog and Cat’s Shared Past
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on dog and cat’s shared past within the Dog and Cat Remember Oden storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're looking. It seems people from around the country have already gathered here in the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Master! It would be in our best interest to retreat for the time being! Quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wish I could actually hear the guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Crap! The two of them saw each other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We made it in the Nick of Time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All three of you! We're not going to yell at you or anything, but please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How many years has it been, you freakish fleabag?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Looks like time has just made you more freakish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: said the mutt who's gotten about half as leg- ish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's not here! How many times must I tell you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I wonder which will happen first? Will you lose this leg,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or will you tell me where the Samural is!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This game starts now, King Dog!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Looks like your arm has seen better days, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Guess you won't be doing any fighting any time soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All you're fit for now is worrying about how you're going to stuff Lasagra into your fat gob!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't tell you the whereabouts of someone not here!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Why in the world would Wano Kingdom citizens come here!?

summary: Dog and Cat’s Shared Past: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
